_doc: Synthetic fixtures hand-authored from the connect-to-database-failures playbook (branch 1: malformed / wrong connection string). Replace with verbatim captures from a real .local/investigations/ before treating as a regression signal (see ../_shared/scripts/generate_scenario.py).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key c1a2b3d4-5e6f-4a7b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs d2b3c4e5-6f7a-4b8c-9d0e-1f2a3b4c5d6e --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
